name: swift-code-reviewer-skill
description: Comprehensive Swift/SwiftUI code review skill: analyze code quality, architecture, performance, security, and Swift 6+ best practices. Multi-layer review covering SwiftUI patterns, async/await, Sendable conformance, navigation routing, theming, dependency injection, testing, accessibility. Project-aware: reads .claude/CLAUDE.md for custom standards. Provides Critical/High/Medium/Low severity issues with file:line references and actionable feedback. Perfect for: PR reviews, code audits, team standards enforcement, refactoring guidance.
author: Vinicius Carvalho
